new_classes.label_en: fat fraction from dairy products of headings 0401 to 0404
new_classes.label_de: Fettanteil aus Erzeugnissen der Positionen 0401 bis 0404
new_classes.definition_en: A fat substance derived from milk or dairy products classified under CN headings 0401 to 0404, used as an ingredient characterising beverages under CN 2202 99 91–99.
A refined fat or oil of vegetable origin added to a skimmed milk base to produce a filled milk beverage classified under CN 2202 99 91–99.

A non-alcoholic beverage not elsewhere specified under heading 2202, containing fat from products of CN headings 0401 to 0404 at a level not elsewhere specified, including ready-to-drink filled milk beverages based on skimmed milk or powdered skimmed milk with added refined vegetable fats or oils, where the fat content from headings 0401–0404 falls above the threshold of 2202 99 95 (≥ 2 % by weight) or otherwise falls under residual code 22029999.

new_properties.label_en: fat content from dairy products of headings 0401–0404 (% by weight)

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the key distinguishing criteria for CN 2202 99 99: (1) the beverage must be non-alcoholic and not elsewhere specified under 2202; (2) it must contain fat from products of headings 0401–0404; (3) filled milk – based on skimmed milk/skimmed milk powder with added refined vegetable fats or oils – is explicitly modelled as a subtype and marked as ready-to-drink. Coverage gaps: (a) the specific numeric fat-content thresholds that distinguish 22029991, 22029995 and 22029999 from each other are referenced in the note fragment but the precise percentages are truncated ("von" is cut off), so the exact decimal range restriction for the 99 residual subcode cannot be fully specified; (b) the residual "not elsewhere specified" exclusion of all sibling codes (22029910–22029995) cannot be expressed in OWL without closed-world enumeration; (c) the legal text fragment appears to be an incomplete excerpt, limiting full coverage.
